summary: Iteration 33 testing complete: All 3 new login page features verified - (1) Apple Sign-In button with black style added, (2) Terms checkbox with 3 links in register mode, (3) Terms must be accepted before registration. Backend 8/8 tests passed. Frontend all UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Apple Sign-In button correctly shows black background (#000) with white text
Apple init endpoint returns auth_url=null when APPLE_CLIENT_ID not configured
Apple callback endpoint creates users with apple_id field in MongoDB
Terms checkbox (data-testid=terms-checkbox) visible only in register mode
3 terms links with correct URLs: zet-kullanim-kosullari, odeme-ve-iade-sozlesmesi, zet-gizlilik-sozlesmesi
Hesap Olustur button disabled (disabled:opacity-40) when terms not accepted
Hesap Olustur button becomes enabled after clicking terms checkbox
Login mode shows footer with Kullanim Kosullari and Gizlilik Politikasi links
Email login and register still work correctly
Error message shown correctly when Apple Sign-In clicked: 'Apple ile giris henuz yapilandirilmadi'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested new login page features. Apple Sign-In MOCKED (APPLE_CLIENT_ID not set in backend/.env). Key test IDs: google-login-btn, apple-login-btn, terms-checkbox, terms-link, payment-terms-link, privacy-policy-link, email-auth-btn, toggle-auth-mode. Terms URLs: zetstudiointernational.com/zet-kullanim-kosullari/, zetstudiointernational.com/odeme-ve-iade-sozlesmesi/, zetstudiointernational.com/zet-gizlilik-sozlesmesi/. Backend APIs: GET /api/auth/apple/init (returns null when not configured), POST /api/auth/apple/callback (creates user with apple_id).

backend_apple_auth.callback_existing_user: PASSED - Handles existing user login correctly
